excerpt: The official programme page for MRes Economics lists International and EU round 2 opening on 2025-11-18 and closing on 2026-02-16. Source: https://www.gla.ac.uk/postgraduate/taught/economicsmres/ Application deadlines All applicants Due to demand for degree places on this programme, the University has an application process with application rounds which recognises that different geographical areas complete and submit their applications at different times of the year. This process aims to ensure fairness and equity to applicants from all geographic regions. Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 17 November 2025 All applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 29 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 18 November 2025 to 16 February 2026 All applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 24 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 17 February 2026 to 25 May 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 6 July 2026. Round 4 application dates: 26 May 2026 to 1 July 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your
matchedTextBefore: Fee for re-assessment of a dissertation (PGT programme): £370
